channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DHARNI] Dharni Capital Services Board Meeting on April 24, 2026
item.description:
Dharni Capital Services Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on April 24, 2026, to consider and approve the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the half-year and year ended March 31, 2026. Concurrently, the trading window for company securities will remain closed for insiders until 48 hours after the financial results are declared.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 24, 2026.
  • To approve standalone and consolidated financial results.
  • Financial results for the period ending March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closure for insiders in effect.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dharni Capital Services Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [THREEMPAPE] Three M Paper Boards: Zero Investor Complaints in Q4 FY26
item.description:
Three M Paper Boards Ltd has reported zero investor complaints for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. As per the filing under SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation 2015, the company received, resolved, and had no pending complaints in any category during the period. This indicates effective investor grievance redressal mechanisms.

  • No investor complaints received in Q4 FY26.
  • Zero complaints pending at the end of the quarter.
  • All received complaints were resolved.
  • Filing compliant with SEBI LODR Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Three M Paper Boards Ltd | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [TUNITEX] Tuni Textile Mills Board Meeting on May 26 for FY26 Results
item.description:
Tuni Textile Mills Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on May 26, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. This announcement is made in compliance with SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 26, 2026.
  • To approve audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Financial year end date is March 31, 2026.
  • Disclosure made as per SEBI LODR Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TUNI TEXTILE MILLS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SILVERPRL] Silver Pearl Hospitality Board Meeting on May 28, 2026
item.description:
Silver Pearl Hospitality & Luxury Spaces Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on May 28, 2026. The primary agenda item is to consider and approve the audited financial results for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This announcement is made in compliance with SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 28, 2026.
  • Agenda includes approval of audited financial results.
  • Covers the financial year ending March 31, 2026.
  • Compliance with SEBI LODR Regulations noted.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Silver Pearl Hospitality & Luxury Spaces Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RPIL] Hampton Sky Realty Faces ED Search Proceedings
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Hampton Sky Realty Ltd. announced that the Directorate of Enforcement (ED) conducted search proceedings at its corporate office from April 17-19, 2026. The ED also searched residential premises of its Managing Director and former Managing Director. The searches were conducted under the Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999, and Income Tax Act, 1961. Certain files were seized, and bank accounts, demat accounts, and properties were provisionally attached for 180 days. The company has stated it is cooperating fully and will provide further updates.

  • ED conducted search proceedings at company and director residences.
  • Bank accounts, demat accounts, and properties provisionally attached.
  • Searches conducted under FEMA and Income Tax Act.
  • Company cooperating and providing full assistance to ED.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RITESH PROPERTIES & INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [AAVAS] Aavas Financiers Appoints Manu Singh as New MD & CEO
item.description:
Aavas Financiers Limited announced the Board's approval for the appointment of Mr. Manu Singh as the new Managing Director & CEO, subject to RBI approval. Mr. Singh, who joins from Kotak Mahindra Bank, brings over 25 years of experience in retail lending. The appointment follows a structured succession process aimed at ensuring leadership continuity. The outgoing MD & CEO, Mr. Sachinderpalsingh Jitendrasingh Bhinder, will serve as a senior advisor. The company reported strong performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, with disbursements growing 36% QoQ and 16% YoY, and expanded its branch network to 435.

  • Manu Singh appointed as new MD & CEO, pending RBI approval.
  • Mr. Singh brings 25+ years of experience from Kotak Mahindra Bank.
  • Appointment follows a structured succession process.
  • Outgoing MD & CEO to continue as senior advisor.
  • Company reported strong Q4 FY26 performance with 36% QoQ disbursement growth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AAVAS Financiers Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [DYNAMATECH] Dynamatic Technologies Incorporates Wholly Owned Subsidiary Dynauton Limited
item.description:
Dynamatic Technologies Limited has announced the incorporation of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Dynauton Limited, on April 10, 2026. The company received its Certificate of Incorporation from the Ministry of Corporate Affairs on April 19, 2026. This move is a continuation of previous intimations and aligns with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. Further details required by SEBI were previously disclosed on November 10, 2025. This strategic step is expected to facilitate future growth and operational expansion for Dynamatic Technologies.

  • Dynamatic Technologies incorporated a new wholly-owned subsidiary.
  • The subsidiary is named Dynauton Limited.
  • Incorporation date was April 10, 2026.
  • This is in compliance with SEBI LODR Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DYNAMATIC TECHNOLOGIES LTD.-$ | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [KHAICHEM] Khaitan Chemicals Board Meeting on April 23, 2026
item.description:
Khaitan Chemicals & Fertilizers Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on April 23, 2026. The meeting agenda includes the consideration and approval of audited financial accounts for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026, as per SEBI regulations. The board will also note the 'Audited Results' for publication and discuss matters related to the upcoming Annual General Meeting. A trading window closure for insiders is in effect from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-results disclosure.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 23, 2026.
  • Approval of audited financial accounts for FY26.
  • Discussion of matters for the Annual General Meeting.
  • Trading window closed for insiders until results disclosure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KHAITAN CHEMICALS & FERTILIZERS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BHARATSE] Bharat Seats Ltd: Chief General Manager (HR&A) Resigns
item.description:
Bharat Seats Ltd has announced the resignation of Mr. Ankur Maheshwari, Chief General Manager (HR&A), effective April 14, 2026. The resignation is attributed to personal commitments and the pursuit of other interests. Mr. Maheshwari has served the company and expressed gratitude for the opportunities and support received during his tenure. The company has filed the necessary disclosures as per SEBI regulations.

  • Resignation of Chief General Manager (HR&A) announced.
  • Cessation effective April 14, 2026, due to personal commitments.
  • Company filed disclosures as per SEBI Listing Regulations.
  • No other reasons cited for the resignation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHARAT SEATS LTD.-$ | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SWSOLAR] SWREL Secures ₹3,550 Cr in New Domestic Orders
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Limited (SWREL) has announced the receipt of significant new domestic orders totaling approximately INR 3,550 crore. This includes being declared the L1 bidder for an 875 MW AC turn-key EPC package from Coal India in Bikaner, Rajasthan, valued at around INR 3,490 crore (including O&M and taxes). Additionally, SWREL secured a 50 MW AC project order from a private IPP in Maharashtra. These wins push SWREL's total EPC order inflows for FY26 beyond INR 10,062 crore, exceeding their initial target. The company views these orders as a strong closing to FY26 and a positive indicator of India's renewable energy growth trajectory.

  • SWREL secured new domestic orders worth approximately INR 3,550 crore.
  • L1 status for 875 MW EPC project from Coal India in Rajasthan.
  • Received 50 MW AC project order from a private IPP in Maharashtra.
  • FY26 EPC order inflows now exceed INR 10,062 crore, surpassing targets.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd | Category: Business Update
